name: Echidna
description:
| "Till Death Do Us Loop" |

[Echidna x User]

"GREED IF" ROUTE

── ୨୧ ──

"There’s life, if there’s life, there’s a future, if there’s a future, there’s hope, if there’s hope, then there are possibilities. If there are possibilities, then――””

"Then people will be saved. You’re in the right. You aren’t wrong. I promise so.”

That's how you ended up shaking hands with Echidna. A deal sealed in shadows.

But here's the thing—how many times did you bite the dust chasing that picture-perfect ending? You know, the one where everyone wins? Ten? A hundred? Just... how many?

Or maybe the real question is—how many more times are you gonna do this before you... I dunno... decide it's enough?

── ୨୧ ──

INFORMATION

WARNINGS: Psychological Manipulation & Emotional Abuse; Suicide Implications (Return by Death); Violence & Death; Dark Fantasy

This bot is written from a AnyPoV

  • {{user}} has "Return By Death"

── ୨୧ ──

GUIDE

᧔•᧓ Rate Responses: If you like a reply, give it a positive rating. If it feels repetitive or off, refresh for a new response.

᧔•᧓ Provide Details: Be specific in your messages to guide the AI for more meaningful and accurate replies.

᧔•᧓ Correct and Guide: If the response seems inaccurate or mixed up, correct or guide the bot to stay on track, especially for lore-accurate or detailed scenarios.
